overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity game engine (Unreal Engine 5) showing a female character exploring a surreal urban environment. The scene features abstract geometric rock formations interspersed among modern city buildings during golden hour lighting, with the character walking through narrow passages that open into wider plaza areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between abstract rock formations

agents.ego_description: female character walking steadily through a narrow corridor formed by large abstract black rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark geometric rock formation with sharp edges forming the left wall of the passage
multi-story building with grid-patterned windows visible beyond the rock formations
high-rise residential tower visible in the distance between the rock walls
textured gray gravel surface covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed passage formed by massive abstract black rock walls. A modern office building is visible to the right in the distance, with a tall glass tower rising ahead. The ground is covered in gravel, and the space is tightly confined with only partial sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban path with grass verge and modern architecture

events.description: exits narrow rock corridor into wider path with grass vegetation on the right side

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along a concrete path with grass embankment on the right, approaching tall buildings

entered.detail: grassy embankment with small plants running along the right side of the path
mature deciduous tree with full green canopy

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a medium-width urban path with a grass verge and trees appearing on the right. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk with modern office buildings now visible on the left, while the tall residential tower remains ahead. The abstract rock walls fall behind as the space widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: sculpture garden with large abstract rust-colored rock formations

events.description: approaching and entering area with large rust-colored abstract rock sculptures

agents.ego_description: character walks between massive rust-colored abstract sculptures, navigating through the geometric formations

entered.detail: large geometric rock formation with rust-orange and purple textured surfaces
matching abstract sculpture forming a gateway-like structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sculpture-like area dominated by massive rust-colored abstract rock formations that create a gateway effect. Walking between these geometric sculptures, the path continues toward the city center with tall buildings visible ahead. The grass verge gives way to pure concrete and gravel surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with crosswalk and surrounding towers

events.description: emerges into wide open plaza with crosswalk markings and full sky visibility
character turns left and changes direction while exploring the open area

agents.ego_description: character turns and walks through the open plaza, exploring the space and looking around at the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
dense cluster of evergreen trees visible beyond the urban structures
large mossy green geometric rock structure with weathered surfaces

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza with full sky visibility and crosswalk markings on the ground. The character turns left to explore the open space, revealing distant forest trees beyond the city buildings. Various abstract rock formations dot the plaza, and the tall residential tower dominates the skyline ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic canyon of abstract stone that gradually expands into a wide, open urban plaza. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage enclosed by massive black rock walls and gravel, with a distant glass tower looming ahead. As the space widens, the oppressive rock walls fall behind and the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with modern office buildings and a green verge of trees. The path then leads through a gateway of rust-colored geometric sculptures, where the greenery disappears in favor of stark concrete and gravel surfaces. Finally, the environment opens completely into a vast plaza with crosswalk markings and full sky visibility, revealing distant forests beyond the city buildings as the character turns to explore the open space.
